title: Amazon Luna boss thinks rising hardware prices could push more hardcore gamers to cloud gaming — 'You're going to see more people that are priced out of the market'
excerpt: Amazon's GM of gaming thinks the rising cost of consoles and PC components could push more hardcore gamers towards cloud streaming.
content_html:
• Amazon's gaming boss thinks ballooning hardware prices could push more hardcore gamers towards cloud streaming services
  • He argued that the price of consoles increasing by 'six, seven times' would mean some gamers become 'priced out of the market'
  • He thinks the RAM crisis, and rising prices, will not be 'going away anytime soon'

Amazon GM of gaming Jeff Gattis thinks the rising cost of consoles and PC components could push more hardcore gamers towards cloud streaming, via services such as Amazon's own Luna.

In a recent interview about the service, I asked whether Gattis anticipates cloud gaming becoming a more popular option for core players as traditional systems become much more expensive.

"Yeah. I wouldn't have said that 18 months ago, and I will say our business model is not really predicated on this this massive shift where everybody turns in their consoles and PCs and comes over to cloud" he said.

"But gosh, when you start to see the prices of the Steam Machine and the rumors of PlayStation and Xbox. As you get to $1,000, $1,500 hardware [...] you're going to see more people that are priced out of the market. They're going to consider other technologies".

Gattis, who previously led platform and subscriptions at Xbox, went on to share an anecdote to illustrate just how much prices have risen.

"I was telling somebody the other day that when I was back at Xbox a couple of years ago, we had our Series S console on discount [for a] holiday. I think it was about $199. To think in a span of two to three years we've gone from $200 to what's likely going to be six, seven times that price.

"I understand it's a it's a RAM crisis, it's worldwide, but I don't think that's going away anytime soon."

Sign up for breaking news, reviews, opinion, top tech deals, and more.

He was, however, careful to clarify that hardcore gamers moving to the cloud isn't a core part of Amazon's strategy: "It's not our strategy to accelerate that, but it's a nice tailwind if it does happen, and it's realistic to think that it might."

The comments come as Amazon rolls out a Fire TV update that gives Amazon Prime subscribers the ability to stream games like Fallout 4 or Fortnite from directly within Prime Video via Luna in a bid to get more eyes on the service.

Follow TechRadar on Google News and add us as a preferred source to get our expert news, reviews, and opinion in your feeds. Make sure to click the Follow button!

Dash is an experienced tech journalist who specializes in video games, electronic entertainment products, and the wider industry that surrounds them. He currently serves as the Gaming Editor at TechRadar, leading our review, preview, feature, and news coverage of the latest and greatest releases.

Before joining the team, he was Contributing Writer at PLAY (formerly Official PlayStation Magazine UK) and has written articles for many of the UK's other biggest gaming magazines including the likes of Edge, PC Gamer, and SFX.

Now, when he's not getting his greasy little mitts on the newest hardware or gaming gadget, he can be found listening to J-pop or feverishly devouring the latest Nintendo Switch otome.

content_html_zh:
• 亚马逊游戏老板认为不断上涨的硬件价格可能会促使更多铁杆游戏玩家转向云流媒体服务
  • 他认为游戏机的价格上涨“六、七倍”将意味着一些游戏玩家“因价格过高而被挤出市场”
  • 他认为 RAM 危机和价格上涨不会“很快消失”

亚马逊游戏总经理 Jeff Gattis 认为，游戏机和 PC 组件成本的上涨可能会促使更多硬核游戏玩家通过亚马逊自己的 Luna 等服务转向云流媒体。

在最近一次有关该服务的采访中，我问盖蒂斯是否预计随着传统系统变得更加昂贵，云游戏将成为核心玩家更受欢迎的选择。

“是的。 18 个月前我不会这么说，我想说的是，我们的商业模式并不是真正基于这种巨大的转变，即每个人都将他们的游戏机和 PC 转向云。”他说。

“但是天哪，当你开始看到 Steam Machine 的价格以及 PlayStation 和 Xbox 的传闻时。 当你达到 1,000 美元、1,500 美元的硬件时 [...] 你会看到更多的人因价格过高而被挤出市场。 他们将考虑其他技术”。

加蒂斯曾领导 Xbox 平台和订阅业务，他接着分享了一个轶事来说明价格上涨了多少。

“前几天我告诉某人，几年前当我回到 Xbox 时，我们的 Series S 游戏机在假期期间打折。 我想大约是199美元。 想想看，在两到三年的时间里，我们的价格已经从 200 美元涨到了可能的六七倍。

“我知道这是一场 RAM 危机，它是全球性的，但我认为这种情况不会很快消失。”

订阅突发新闻、评论、观点、顶级技术交易等。

不过，他小心翼翼地澄清，铁杆游戏玩家迁移到云端并不是亚马逊战略的核心部分：“这不是我们加速这一战略的战略，但如果它确实发生，那将是一个很好的顺风车，并且认为它可能会实现这一点是现实的。”

这些评论发布之际，亚马逊推出了 Fire TV 更新，该更新使 Amazon Prime 订阅者能够通过 Luna 直接在 Prime Video 内播放《辐射 4》或《堡垒之夜》等游戏，以吸引更多人关注该服务。

在 Google 新闻上关注 TechRadar，并将我们添加为首选来源，以便在您的 Feed 中获取我们的专家新闻、评论和意见。 请务必点击“关注”按钮！

Dash 是一位经验丰富的科技记者，专门研究视频游戏、电子娱乐产品及其周边更广泛的行业。 他目前担任 TechRadar 的游戏编辑，领导我们对最新和最精彩版本的评论、预览、专题报道和新闻报道。

在加入团队之前，他是 PLAY（前英国官方 PlayStation 杂志）的特约撰稿人，并为许多英国其他最大的游戏杂志撰写文章，包括《Edge》、《PC Gamer》和《SFX》等。

现在，当他没有戴上最新的硬件或游戏设备时，你会发现他正在听日本流行音乐或狂热地吞噬最新的任天堂 Switch 乙女游戏。
